evals.prompt: Revisa mi monorepo en barrel-vs-direct/ por problemas de barrel exports. Turborepo con Next.js y @repo/ui.
evals.expected_output: Identifies barrel files in the monorepo, classifies them by type and risk, checks bundler/package config, and provides a structured analysis report.
expectations: Identifies barrel/index.ts files in the @repo/ui package
Classifies barrel files by type (pure barrel, mixed, entry point)
Assigns risk levels (Critical, High, Medium, Low) to each barrel
Checks package.json for exports field and bundler configuration
Presents findings in a structured analysis report with table format

evals.prompt: Quiero migrar los barrel imports en barrel-app/ a imports directos. Todo viene de @repo/ui por un index.ts.
evals.expected_output: Maps consumer files to their barrel imports, verifies direct paths exist, shows before/after diffs for each file, and processes file by file.
expectations: Finds all files in barrel-app/ that import from @repo/ui barrel
Maps each imported symbol to its direct source file path
Verifies that direct import paths actually exist before proposing changes
Shows before/after import diffs for each consumer file
Processes changes file by file (not bulk auto-apply)
Suggests updating package.json exports field for subpath imports

evals.prompt: Mi First Load JS es 155 kB, creo que es por como importamos: 'import { Button, Card } from @repo/ui'. Tree-shaking no funciona?
evals.expected_output: Explains why barrel imports defeat tree-shaking, identifies the barrel pattern as the cause, references the 19x bundle reduction data, and proposes concrete migration steps.
expectations: Explains that barrel imports (index.ts re-exports) defeat tree-shaking
Identifies the import pattern from @repo/ui as the likely cause of large bundles
References the 19x bundle size reduction (224 KB vs 11.7 KB) from experiment data
Recommends migrating to direct imports as the solution
Suggests running next build to measure baseline before migration
Proposes checking for side effects in barrel files before migrating
